description:
# Phase 5: Enterprise Features

Features driving enterprise adoption and commercial viability: white-labeling, theme marketplace, enterprise support, LTS releases, migration tooling. Months 19-24.

## Phases
1. Build white-labeling toolkit and theme CLI
2. Establish LTS release process and migration tooling
3. Launch theme marketplace and enterprise support tiers
title: [Epic] Phase 5: Enterprise Features
